mapper.select: SELECT e.*, co.name AS course_name, cl.name AS class_name FROM exam e LEFT JOIN course co ON e.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON e.class_id = cl.id ORDER BY e.id
SELECT e.*, co.name AS course_name, cl.name AS class_name FROM exam e LEFT JOIN course co ON e.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON e.class_id = cl.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (name, course_id, class_id, exam_date, start_time, end_time, location, total_score, status, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{examDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{totalScore}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET name=#{name}, course_id=#{courseId}, class_id=#{classId}, exam_date=#{examDate}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, location=#{location}, total_score=#{totalScore}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
